updates.title: Meta Will Use AI Chat Data for Ad Targeting
updates.summary: Meta updated its privacy policy to use data from user interactions with its AI services (Meta AI) for targeted ads across Facebook, Instagram, and Threads.
updates.action: Expect richer AI-driven audience signals. Advertisers do not need to act, but be aware users may push back on this change.

updates.title: TikTok Ownership Uncertainty: Marketers Brace for 2026 Whiplash
updates.summary: Following the US TikTok ban scare and sale process, marketers entered 2026 cautious about committing ad budgets. Many paused or diversified spend to Reels and YouTube Shorts as contingency.
updates.action: Maintain a diversified short-video strategy across TikTok, Reels, and Shorts. Do not over-concentrate budget on any single platform.

updates.title: Partnership Ads Hub: Auto-Surface UGC, Affiliate, and Creator Posts
updates.summary: Meta's updated Partnership Ads Hub automatically surfaces Instagram UGC, affiliate content, and creator posts that mention your brand. Professional Mode profiles are now eligible, and creators can share ad codes instantly.
updates.action: Check the Partnership Ads Hub in Ads Manager. Look for organic creator content you can amplify as paid ads without additional creator outreach.

updates.title: Google Opens Ads for Prediction Markets (CFTC-Regulated Only)
updates.summary: Google now permits ads for prediction markets in the US, but only for federally regulated entities authorized by the CFTC as Designated Contract Markets or by the NFA as brokerages. Effective January 21.
updates.action: If you operate a regulated prediction market, you can now advertise on Google. All others remain blocked.

updates.title: Call-Only Ads: No New Creation, Full Phase-Out by Feb 2027
updates.summary: Google removed the ability to create new call-only ads. Existing ones continue serving until February 2027 when they stop receiving impressions entirely.
updates.action: Migrate all call-only ads to responsive search ads with call assets now. Do not wait for the 2027 deadline.

updates.title: Google Ads API v23: Channel-Level Reporting for PMax Finally Here
updates.summary: API v23 introduces channel-level reporting for Performance Max, showing how PMax distributes spend across Search, YouTube, Display, Gmail, Discover, and Maps. Turns PMax from a black box into a transparent campaign type.
updates.action: Ensure your tools or scripts are updated to API v23. Pull channel-level reports to see where PMax is actually spending. API v19 stopped working Feb 11.

updates.title: Meridian Scenario Planner: No-Code Budget Forecasting with Projected ROI
updates.summary: Google expanded Meridian with Scenario Planner, a no-code interface to test budget scenarios and view projected ROI outcomes in real time. Aimed at replacing the gaps left by Performance Planner changes.
updates.action: Try Meridian Scenario Planner for cross-channel budget planning. Compare its projections against your actual performance data before relying on it.

updates.title: Meta Graph API v25.0: Unified Advantage+ Campaign API, Async Error Reporting
updates.summary: Graph API v25.0 launched Feb 18 with enhanced async error reporting for Ads Insights API. Old ASC and AAC APIs deprecated - must migrate to the unified Advantage+ campaign API.
updates.action: If using Meta Marketing API directly, migrate from ASC/AAC endpoints to the unified Advantage+ campaign API before the old ones stop working.

updates.title: Ad Sequencing Rolls Out to Auction Campaigns (14-17x Conversion Lift)
updates.summary: Ad sequencing is no longer reservation-only. Now available for auction campaigns. Early data shows 14-17x conversion lift for controlled 2-3 ad sequences.
updates.action: Test 2-3 ad sequences in your auction campaigns. Tell a story: problem > solution > proof. Measure conversion lift against non-sequenced campaigns.

updates.title: Smart+ Creative Automation: Auto-Select High-Performing Ads
updates.summary: Creative for Smart+ brings automation to the creative process. Auto-select scans existing ads and eligible creator content from TikTok One to recommend high-performing creatives aligned with your brand goals.
updates.action: Enable Smart+ Creative auto-select on App campaigns. Feed it diverse creative and let it pick winners. Compare against manual creative selection.

updates.title: HubSpot 2026: Search Is No Longer the Starting Point for Buyer Journeys
updates.summary: HubSpot State of Marketing 2026 (1,500+ marketers) found buyers now move through AI tools, social, creator content, communities, and review sites before reaching a brand website.
updates.action: Map your buyer journey across AI tools, social, review sites, and communities.

updates.title: Meta Shifts to Outcome-Based Optimization: Performance Drops Expected
updates.summary: In the first week of March, Meta moved from auction-based placement optimization to outcome-based optimization. The system now predicts downstream conversions rather than optimizing for engagement.
updates.action: Give campaigns 7-10 days before making changes. Focus on conversion goals, not engagement metrics.

updates.title: PMax Gets Auto AI Voice-Overs on Video Ads (Opt-Out by Mar 20)
updates.summary: Google is auto-enrolling advertisers into an AI voice-over program that narrates PMax video ads using headlines and descriptions. Ads without existing audio get voice enhancement automatically unless you opt out.
updates.action: Check your PMax video ads. If you do not want AI-generated voice-overs, opt out before the deadline.

updates.title: Meta Location Fees: Ad Prices Rise in 6 Countries Starting April
updates.summary: Meta adds Location Fees for Digital Service Taxes starting April. Austria 5%, France 3%, Italy 3%, Spain 3%, Turkey 5%, UK 2%.
updates.action: Factor Location Fees into EU/UK budget planning. Adjust CPA targets upward.

updates.title: Meta Ad Policy Crackdown: 34% More Rejections in Health/Wellness/Beauty
updates.summary: Meta upgraded multimodal AI enforcement in Q1 2026 with new rules on misleading claims, personal attributes, crypto tiers, and diabetes restrictions. Rejection rates spiked 34% in health/wellness/beauty.
updates.action: Audit all health/wellness/beauty ad copy for compliance. Remove before/after language and unsubstantiated claims.

updates.title: Google AI Mode Now Shows Shopping Ads and Sponsored Stores
updates.summary: Google AI Mode, with 75M+ daily active users, now supports shopping ad formats and sponsored stores inside conversational search. Advertisers using PMax, Shopping, and Search broad match are automatically eligible.
updates.action: Ensure you are running PMax or Shopping campaigns with broad match to appear in AI Mode. No separate opt-in needed.

updates.title: Advantage+ Sales Threshold Drops to 25 Conversions/Week
updates.summary: Advantage+ Sales now requires only 25 conversions per week, down from 50. Predictive Budget Allocation reports 8-15% ROAS improvement.
updates.action: Re-evaluate Advantage+ for accounts that previously could not hit the 50 threshold.

updates.title: TikTok NewFronts: 5 New Premium Ad Formats Including Logo Takeover
updates.summary: TikTok unveiled Logo Takeover, Prime Time (3 sequential ads in 15-min window), TopReach (TopView + TopFeed), Pulse Mentions, and Pulse Tastemakers at NewFronts 2026.
updates.action: Consider Logo Takeover or TopReach for launches. Test Pulse Mentions to appear next to organic brand conversations.

updates.title: March Demand Gen Drop: AI Video from Images + Creator Partnerships
updates.summary: Google launched Veo AI video generation from static images for Demand Gen. Creator partnership tool finds YouTube creators and turns their content into ads. Creator assets drive 30% conversion lift on Shorts.
updates.action: Test Veo AI video generation from your best product images. Use the creator discovery tool for authentic content.

updates.title: Meta NewFronts: Reels Trend Ads, Creator Discovery, AI Creative Tools
updates.summary: At IAB NewFronts, Meta announced ad placements aligned with Reels trends, improved creator partnership discovery, new AI creative tools, and expanded affiliate/in-stream checkout options.
updates.action: Explore Reels trend-aligned placements. Use the new creator discovery tools for authentic content.

updates.title: TikTok Bans AI-Generated Endorsements, Requires Business Verification
updates.summary: Under new ownership rules, TikTok now requires all advertisers to use first-party data through Events API, verify business registration, and bans AI-generated endorsements in ads.
updates.action: Verify your business registration in TikTok Ads Manager. Switch to Events API for conversion tracking. Remove any AI-generated testimonials or endorsements from ad creative.

updates.title: Google March 2026 Core Update Rolling Out
updates.summary: Google launched its March 2026 core update alongside a spam update. Semrush Sensor reported Very High keyword volatility for nearly the entire month.
updates.action: Do not make reactive SEO changes during the rollout. Monitor rankings for 2-3 weeks. Focus on content quality and E-E-A-T signals.

updates.title: WPP Dissolves Holding Company Model: Merges Ogilvy, VML, AKQA
updates.summary: WPP announced Elevate28, consolidating Ogilvy, VML, AKQA, and WPP Media under one structure. Targeting 500M GBP savings by 2028.
updates.action: If working with any WPP agency, expect structural changes. Signals a broader shift toward AI-driven agency operations.
